1027 N0415K1_ANTICONVULSANT_TKNG_CD N0415K1_ANTICONVULSANT_TKNG_CD N0415K1 - High-Risk Drug (Is Taking): Anticonvulsant CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether an anticonvulsant medication was taken by the resident at any time during the 7-day observation period (or since admission/entry or reentry if less than 7 days). 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
